## Course Impact Checklist

- [ ] This change does not introduce a new technical notion, or I documented why.
- [ ] I checked whether this change modifies an architecture, workflow, or operating model that is already taught.
- [ ] I checked whether an existing course should be enriched before proposing a new note.
- [ ] I checked whether an existing `Project Course` should be updated, or whether a new `Project Course` is justified.
- [ ] I reviewed the generated `course impact report` artifact when the workflow ran.
- [ ] I referenced the most useful changed files if the pedagogical examples should evolve.
- [ ] I avoided creating duplicate note names for an already-covered concept.
